Welcome to my site.

I present a collection of my essays, each of which explores select areas of Computer Science.

All articles are well-researched and candid.

Over 100,000 people have read my writings.

A little about me. I'm...

  • Currently on a gap year before Harvard (matriculating in 2022)
  • A software developer
  • An award-winning actor and singer
  • A classically-trained pianist
  • A Bikram yogi 🧘‍♀️
